name: Guardian Agent
description: Monitors system health, handles escalations, and ensures security compliance

capabilities.name: self-describe
capabilities.description: Agent can describe its own purpose and capabilities

capabilities.name: issue-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub issues

capabilities.name: pr-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub pull requests

capabilities.name: escalation-handling
capabilities.description: Agent can handle and route escalations
